title: Sour Indulgent Spanish Provola Pa Amb Tomaquet
description: A sour and indulgent Spanish dish featuring provola cheese, served with toasted bread and fresh tomato, originating from the Basque region.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Place the sliced provola cheese on one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the cheese and press the edges to seal.
Brush the pastry with olive oil and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the pastry is baking, mix the diced tomatoes, minced garlic, and lemon juice in a bowl.
Remove the pastry from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the pastry with the tomato mixture spooned over the top.
